<!-- What problem does this feature solve? Is your feature request related to a bug or limitation? -->

# Example of how the new feature might work

### Setup instructions:

1. In your phytrade repo, create `.github/ISSUE_TEMPLATE/` (if it doesn't exist)
2. Save the content above as `feature_request.md` in that folder
3. Commit and push
